title: Aurora Borealis Made Better
description: Do you like those beatiful Auroras? Well I've added Aurora Borealis items that are rare and powerful.
body: # Do you like those beautiful Northern Lights? Well FEAR NOT! This mod adds Aurora Borealis items! When a player joins, a timer starts. After 15 minutes, a message will appear saying that an Aurora Borealis has formed. **Quickly! Find it!** When you get to the location, you'll see an item. That item is the **"Aurora Borealis Shard"**! You can smelt it to get a **"Purified Aurora Borealis Shard"**. You need to collect 9 of these purified shards to get a **Block of Aurora Borealis**. This is a powerful light block that can be used to light up any area. # Why would you choose this mod? Well, if you're looking for _pretty visuals_, then you're in the wrong place, but if you want some functionality, this mod is just right for you! ### Have a good game!
